WflWT 3 W ,^ ~ . 18(2), ld^dld<JlcHiJ + «I6^IM + , *\$ U l M l H * . atfW* Id^dld-UM-M £KI i M - t l t t d «W(^H ^ WWW ^ 4^ £d xJ*M ^IfllH * l JI6H $ ^ Va^lil M-i' la^JldtJIcH-iJ JMc^M Jfl-ylJI * 1- . ^ 1 [ t a IM/4/arai./24/121 CENTRAL UNIVERSITY OF RAJASTHAN Ajmer, the 29th June, 2012 No. CURAJ/R/F. 35/666(1).— Amendment and Addition to the Existing Statutes Title Amendment in the existing Statute 2(4) After amendment As existing 2(4) The Vice - Chancellor shall hold office for a term 2(4) The Vice - Chancellor shall hold office for a term of five years from the date of which he enters upon his of five years from the date on which he enters upon office, or until he attains the age of seventy years, his office, or until he attains the age of seventy whichever is earlier and he shall not be eligible for re- years, whichever is earlier and he shall be eligible for appointment : re-appointment for another term : -- 2 of 3 -- [*TFI H I — W i g 4 ] , *=TTTcT ^ 1 TTST^ : 3TOI^R^T Provided that notwithstanding the expiry of the said No change period of five years, he shall continue in office until his successor is appointed and enters upon his office : Provided further that the visitor may direct any Vice - No change Chancellor after his term has expired, to continue in office for such period, not exceeding a total period of one year, as may be specified by him. Title Addition to the existing Statute 15(1) As existing 15 (1) The University shall have the following School of Studies, namely : - After amendment 15 (1) The University shall have the following School of Studies, namely : - (i) School of Mathematics, Statistics and Computational Sciences (ii) School of Humanities and Languages (iii) School of Social Sciences (iv) School of Commerce and Management (v) School of Chemical Sciences and Pharmacy (vi) School of Engineering and Technology (i) School of Mathematics, Statistics and Computational Sciences (ii) School of Humanities and Languages (iii) School of Social Sciences (iv) School of Commerce and Management (v) School of Chemical Sciences and Pharmacy (vi) School of Engineering and Technology (vii) School of Life Sciences (viii) School of Physical Sciences (ix) School of Earth Sciences (x) School of Architecture (xi) School of Education (xii) School of Legal Studies (xiii) School of Performing Arts (xiv) Interdisciplinary School of Health Sciences (xv) School of Agricultural Sciences Title Amendment in the existing Statute 18(2) As existing 18 (2) Selection committee for the post of Professor, Associate Professor and Assistant Professor, Registrar, Finance Officer, Controller of Examinations, Librarian and Principal of College of Institution maintained by the University shall be constituted as per table mentioned in The Statute of the University 18(2). After amendment 18 (2) Selection committee for the post of Professor, Associate Professor and Assistant Professor, Registrar, Finance Officer, Controller of Examinations, Librarian and Principal of College of Institution maintained by the University shall be constituted as per the extant UGC regulations on the subject. Dr. K.M.HIRON1, Registrar [ADVr.Hl/4/Exty./24/12] Printed by the Manager, Government of India Press, Ring Road, Mayapun, New Delhi-1 10064 and Published by the Controller of Publications, Delhi-1 10054 -- 3 of 3 --
